wallet.notVerifiedDesc: Your daily mint accumulates, but spends transfer 0 until a miner verifies you.
wallet.spendMultiplier: Spend multiplier {{multiplier}}× — recipients get {{percent}}% of what you send.
wallet.notOnNetwork: This wallet isn't on the connected network
wallet.notOnNetworkDesc: This account was created on a different network or database, so the node running now does not have it. Reconnect to its original network, or start over with a new wallet.
wallet.startOver: Start over with a new wallet
wallet.startOverNote: "Start over" clears this saved wallet and returns to setup. Your 12-word recovery phrase still restores the old account on its original network.
